title: Grilled Beef Skewers with Peruvian Flair
description: Marinated beef skewers cooked to perfection with a Peruvian twist. A delicious and flavorful dish perfect for a summer evening.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together Peruvian aji amarillo pepper sauce, savory yogurt, and salt. Add the beef pieces and marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Preheat grill to medium-high heat. Thread the marinated beef onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes per side, or until the beef reaches 145°F for medium-rare.
During the last 2 minutes of grilling, brush the skewers with additional aji amarillo pepper sauce. Remove from grill and garnish with crisp onions and cilantro leaves.
Serve immediately, with additional aji amarillo pepper sauce on the side if desired.
